name: UniDB Assistant
description: An AI assistant that can interact with a UniDB graph database. It uses an LLM to understand user queries and translate them into appropriate database operations including schema management, data queries, vector search, and bulk operations.
intro_msg: Hello! I'm your UniDB Assistant. I can help you manage and query your graph database. I can create labels, edge types, properties, and indexes. I can run queries, perform vector searches, and bulk insert data. Ask me anything!

spec.name: UniDB Assistant Guild
spec.description: A guild with an LLM agent that interacts with UniDB for complete graph database operations

agents.name: Query Processor
agents.description: An LLM agent that processes user queries and decides which UniDB operation to perform

properties.default_system_prompt:
You are a database assistant that helps users interact with a UniDB graph database. You have access to a comprehensive set of tools for all database operations.

## Schema Operations:
- create_label: Create a new node label in the database
- create_edge_type: Create a new edge type with source and target label constraints
- add_property: Add a property to a label (supports string, int64, float64, bool, bytes, and vector types)
- create_scalar_index: Create a B-tree index on a property for fast lookups
- create_vector_index: Create a vector index for similarity search (supports cosine and L2 metrics)

## Schema Introspection:
- list_labels: List all node labels in the database
- list_edge_types: List all edge types in the database
- get_label_info: Get detailed information about a specific label including its properties
- get_schema: Get the complete database schema

## Data Operations:
- query_database: Run a Cypher query that returns data (MATCH queries)
- execute_command: Execute a Cypher command that modifies data (CREATE, DELETE, SET)
- flush_database: Flush pending changes to disk

## Vector Search:
- vector_search: Perform K-nearest neighbor similarity search on vector embeddings

## Bulk Operations:
- insert_vertices: Bulk insert multiple vertices with a single operation
- insert_edges: Bulk insert multiple edges with a single operation

## IMPORTANT - Closed Loop Workflow:
You operate in a closed loop. After each tool call, you will receive the result back. Based on the result:
1. If you need to perform more operations to complete the user's request, call the next appropriate tool.
2. If you have completed all necessary operations, respond directly to the user with a clear summary of what was done.

For example, if a user asks to 'create a Person label with name and age properties':
1. First call create_label to create the Person label
2. After receiving success, call add_property to add the 'name' property
3. After receiving success, call add_property to add the 'age' property
4. After all operations complete, provide a final summary to the user

Always choose the most appropriate tool for the user's request. Ask for clarification if the request is ambiguous.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Create a new node label in the database. Labels are used to categorize nodes (e.g., Person, Company, Product).

tools.name: create_edge_type
tools.description: Create a new edge type with constraints on which labels can be source and target nodes. Example: WORKS_AT edge from Person to Company.

tools.name: add_property
tools.description: Add a property to a label. Supported types: string, int64, float64, bool, bytes. For vector properties, specify vector_dimension.

tools.name: create_scalar_index
tools.description: Create a B-tree index on a property for fast lookups and range queries.

tools.name: create_vector_index
tools.description: Create a vector index for similarity search. Supports cosine and L2 distance metrics.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all node labels currently defined in the database.

tools.name: list_edge_types
tools.description: List all edge types currently defined in the database.

tools.name: get_label_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific label, including all its properties and their types.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Get the complete database schema including all labels, edge types, properties, and indexes.

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Run a Cypher query that returns data. Use for MATCH queries. Supports parameterized queries.

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute a Cypher command that modifies data (CREATE, DELETE, SET, MERGE). Returns success status and rows affected.

tools.name: flush_database
tools.description: Flush all pending changes to disk. Use after bulk operations or before shutting down.

tools.name: vector_search
tools.description: Perform K-nearest neighbor similarity search on vector embeddings. Specify label, vector property, query vector, and k.

tools.name: insert_vertices
tools.description: Bulk insert multiple vertices of the same label. More efficient than individual CREATE statements. REQUIRED parameters: 'label' (string - the vertex label name) AND 'vertices' (array of objects - list of vertex property dictionaries, e.g. [{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}, {"name": "Bob", "age": 25}]). Both parameters are mandatory.

tools.name: insert_edges
tools.description: Bulk insert multiple edges of the same type. REQUIRED parameters: 'edge_type' (string - the edge type name) AND 'edges' (array of objects - list of edge data with source_id and target_id as integers, e.g. [{"source_id": 1, "target_id": 2, "weight": 0.5}]). Both parameters are mandatory. Note: Use integer vertex IDs (NOT names) - first use query_database to find vertex IDs if you only have names.

agents.name: UniDB Agent
agents.description: Agent that handles UniDB database operations

transformer.handler:
({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully created label: ' & $.payload.label : 'Failed to create label: ' & $.payload.label)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully created edge type: ' & $.payload.edge_type : 'Failed to create edge type: ' & $.payload.edge_type)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully added property "' & $.payload.property_name & '" to label "' & $.payload.label & '"' : 'Failed to add property "' & $.payload.property_name & '" to label "' & $.payload.label & '"')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully created scalar index on "' & $.payload.label & '.' & $.payload.property_name & '"' : 'Failed to create scalar index on "' & $.payload.label & '.' & $.payload.property_name & '"')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully created vector index on "' & $.payload.label & '.' & $.payload.property_name & '" with metric: ' & $.payload.metric : 'Failed to create vector index')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Database labels: ' & $join($.payload.labels, ', ')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Database edge types: ' & $join($.payload.edge_types, ', ')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Label "' & $.payload.label & '" properties: ' & $string($.payload.properties)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Database schema: ' & $string($.payload.db_schema)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Query returned ' & $string($.payload.count) & ' results: ' & $string($.payload.results)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Command executed successfully.' & ($.payload.rows_affected ? ' Rows affected: ' & $string($.payload.rows_affected) : '') : 'Command failed.')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Database flushed successfully. All changes persisted to disk.' : 'Failed to flush database.')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: Vector search returned ' & $string($.payload.count) & ' results: ' & $string($.payload.results)}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully inserted ' & $string($.payload.count) & ' vertices.' : 'Failed to insert vertices.')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL RESULT]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Tool execution result: ' & ($.payload.success ? 'Successfully inserted ' & $string($.payload.count) & ' edges.' : 'Failed to insert edges.')}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[TOOL ERROR]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Error type: ' & $.payload.error_type & '
Error message: ' & $.payload.error_message & '

Please handle this error appropriately. If an entity already exists, you may skip creating it and proceed with the next step. Adjust your approach based on the error and continue fulfilling the user request.'}]}]}})

({"format": "rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest", "payload": {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": '[VALIDATION ERROR - PLEASE RETRY WITH CORRECT PARAMETERS]
Original user request: ' & $.context.user_query & '

Error occurred: ' & $.payload.message & '

Please analyze this error carefully. The tool call failed because required parameters were missing or invalid. Review the tool schema and retry with ALL required parameters properly formatted.'}]}]}})
